items.s1: In Taiwan, all schools have professional development sessions for teachers.

items.s2: Teachers learn new skills and strategies during their professional development sessions.

items.s1: During recess, students like to swing.
items.s1z: 下課時，學生們喜歡玩盪鞦韆。
items.s2: You kick your legs up and down to swing.
items.s2z: 盪鞦韆時，你的腳要上下踢動。
items.sch: 彰化縣彰化市中山國小

items.s1: The students check out books from the library at recess.
items.s1z: 同學們利用下課到圖書室借書。

items.s2z: 向圖書館員辦理借閱手續後，同學們可以將書帶回家看。
items.sch: 彰化縣彰化市中山國小

items.s1: It's important to wash your hands after using the bathroom.
items.s1z: 上完廁所後洗手是很重要的。
items.s2: Make sure to wash your hands with soap and water before eating.
items.s2z: 確定在吃東西之前要用香皂和水來洗手。
items.sch: 彰化縣彰化市中山國小

items.s1: These students are practicing to rollerblade.
items.s1z: 這些學生正在練習溜直排輪。

items.s2z: 溜直排輪既可提供娛樂，又可作為運動。

items.s1: These students are learning to play badminton.

items.s1: In the relay race, students pass their batons to the next runners.

items.s2: The relay race is a very exciting event.

items.s1: The students write in their workbooks.

items.s1: A graduation is a ceremony students who have completed the highest grade level at their school.

items.s1: Students go to different stations around the gym.

items.s1: The students browse the boxes of books.

items.s1: The school has its own garden where students can learn how to take care of plants.
items.s1z: 學校有自己的花園，學生可以在那裡學習如何照顧植物。
items.s2: The students get to work outside, pulling weeds and watering the plants to take care of the garden.
items.s2z: 學生們開始在戶外工作，拔除雜草並澆灌植物以照料花園。

items.s1: The teacher models story listening to his students.

items.s2: Story listening is a strategy to help students comprehend what they hear.

items.s1: In this contest, students are shown English words with their letters in the wrong order.

items.s2: The students have to put the letters in the correct order and spell the words.
items.s2z: 同學們必須把字母順序調整正確並拼出單字。

items.s2: The teachers coach the students to help them prepare for the big event.

items.s2z: 同學們在遊樂場上爬上單槓並且轉圈。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: Before entering the school, the students have to sanitize their hands.
items.s1z: 在進入學校之前，學生們必須對雙手進行消毒。
items.s2: The guard sprays alcohol on students' hands to sanitize their hands.
items.s2z: 保安人員往學生手上噴酒精消毒。
items.sch: 彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小

items.s1: In kickball, the pitcher rolls the ball to the person who kicks.
items.s1z: 玩足壘球時，投手滾動球給人踢。
items.s2: The students gather at the track to play kickball.
items.s2z: 同學們聚在操場玩足壘球。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: The high jump takes a lot of practice.
items.s1z: 跳高需要很多練習。
items.s2: The high jump is a fun event to watch.
items.s2z: 跳高是很好看的賽事。
items.sch: 彰化縣福興鄉育新國小

items.s1: Artificial intelligence, also called AI, is an extremely important modern technology.
items.s1z: 人工智慧又稱為AI，它是非常重要的現代科技。
items.s2: It's valuable for the students to learn about artificial intelligence because this technology will have a huge impact on all our lives.
items.s2z: 學習人工智慧對學生而已是很寶貴的經驗，因為這項科技對於我們的生活將有巨大的影響。
items.sch: 彰化縣花壇鄉花壇國中

items.s1: Using water bottles is a good way to preserve the environment.
items.s1z: 使用水壺是保護環境的好方法。
items.s2: Students fill up their water bottles in between classes.
items.s2z: 學生在下課期間將水壺裝滿。
items.sch: 彰化縣芳苑鄉路上國小

items.s1: One by one, the students are training for the long jump event.
items.s1z: 同學們一個接一個訓練跳遠。
items.s2: The students are making sure to jump from the right position for the long jump event.
items.s2z: 同學們確認跳遠時起跳的正確位置。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: The students throw balls at each other during the dodgeball game.
items.s1z: 在躲避球賽中，同學們用球互丟。
items.s2: The students get ready to play dodgeball by putting on pads.
items.s2z: 同學們穿上護膝準備打躲避球。
items.sch: 彰化縣和美鎮和美國小

items.s1: The students are mixing the ingredients together to get ready to make cookies in baking class.
items.s1z: 在上烘焙課時，同學們將原料混合後，準備好做餅乾。
items.s2: Once the ingredients are mixed together, the students put the cookies in the oven for baking.
items.s2z: 原料混合後，同學們將餅乾放入烤箱烘焙。
items.sch: 彰化市東芳國小

items.s1: The students are practicing street dance by synchronizing their moves.
items.s1z: 同學們同時跳一樣的舞步來練習街舞。
items.s2: In dance class, the students are moving to the instructions of the teachers.
items.s2z: 在舞蹈課，同學們隨著老師的指導擺動身體。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: Once the students are ready, they put their pizzas in the oven to cook.
items.s1z: 當學生將披薩做好後，他們把它放入烤箱去烤。
items.s2: After they take the freshly-baked pizzas out of the oven, they cut each pie into slices.
items.s2z: 把剛烤好的披薩拿出烤箱後，他們將每一片披薩切成好幾片。
items.sch: 彰化縣北斗鎮北斗國中

items.s1: In science class, students used a weather vane to check the direction of the wind.
items.s1z: 在自然課，學生們用風向標檢查風的方向。
items.s2: After using the weather vane, the students wrote the direction of the wind in their workbook.
items.s2z: 使用風向標後，學生們在他們的作業本上寫下風的方向。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: The students are practicing shot put in the field.
items.s1z: 同學在操場上練習推鉛球。
items.s2: The students are taking turns doing shot put for track and field.
items.s2z: 同學們輪流推鉛球為田徑賽做準備。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: The children are jumping, sliding, and climbing at the playground.
items.s1z: 小朋友在遊樂場上跳躍、溜滑梯和爬上爬下。
items.s2: The children are enjoying playing at the playground with their friends.
items.s2z: 小朋友喜歡和朋友在遊樂場玩耍。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: The girls work very hard, rehearsing their dance routines with their instructor.
items.s1z: 這群女孩子很認真和老師排練他們的舞步。
items.s2: Once they know the moves like the backs of their hands, the girls perform their dance routines in front of their classmates.
items.s2z: 一旦他們將舞步練到很熟之後，他們在同學的面前表演。
items.sch: 彰化縣鹿港鎮鹿鳴國中

items.s1: The students gathered together for a cultural exchange activity at Hemei High School.
items.s1z: 和美高中的學生聚集做文化交流的活動。
items.s2: During the cultural exchange, they took foreign visitors to a historical site.
items.s2z: 在文化交流的活動中，他們帶著國外的來賓參觀歷史古蹟。
items.sch: 彰化縣和美鎮和美高中

items.s1: The students are working together to construct a slide with building blocks.
items.s1z: 同學們一起用積木建造一個滑梯。
items.s2: The students are playing with their final construction made of building blocks.
items.s2z: 學生們正在玩他們用積木建造的成品。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: On April 23, World Book Day, a day to promote books and reading, is celebrated around the world.
items.s1z: 4月23日世界閱讀日是全世界推廣書本與閱讀的日子。
items.s2: On World Book Day, the school organizes an event at the school library to promote reading.
items.s2z: 在世界閱讀日當天，學校在圖書館辦了一個活動來推廣閱讀。
items.sch: 彰化縣和美鎮和美高中

items.s1: The school takes the students on an exciting and educational field trip to a museum.
items.s1z: 學校帶領學生到一個博物館做戶外教學。
items.s2: The museum has a variety of exhibits about Taiwanese history for visitors to enjoy.
items.s2z: 這個博物館有很多關於台灣歷史的展覽讓遊客欣賞。
items.sch: 彰化縣和美鎮和美高中

items.s1: The school encourages students to read more by taking them to the library to read each week.
items.s1z: 學校每週帶學生到圖書館以鼓勵學生多閱讀。
items.s2: The school also encourages them to read by giving awards to students that finish a lot of books.
items.s2z: 學校也藉由頒獎給讀很多書的小朋友來鼓勵他們。
items.sch: 彰化縣二林鎮廣興國小

items.s1: The basketball players perform various drills to improve their skills.
items.s1z: 籃球隊員做各種訓練來提昇他們的技巧。
items.s2: The coach watches the players as they do ball-handling drills.
items.s2z: 教練看著這些籃球員做控球的訓練。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: When the students arrive at school in the morning, they get in line and wait for their turn to practice English.
items.s1z: 當學生早上到校時，他們排隊等待練習講英語。
items.s2: Once they get to the front of the line, the teacher asks them to read several phrases in English.
items.s2z: 一旦學生到了隊伍的前面時，老師要求他們唸幾個英文片語。
items.sch: 彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小

items.s1: A pencil sharpener is a tool for sharpening the tip of a pencil.
items.s1z: 削鉛筆機是將筆尖削尖的工具。
items.s2: Some pencil sharpeners are electric, but the ones in this classroom are powered by hand.
items.s2z: 有些削鉛筆機是電動的，但是這個教室內的是手動的。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: On rainy days, people use umbrellas to shield themselves from the rain.
items.s1z: 下雨天時，人們用雨傘擋雨。
items.s2: When you leave your house on a rainy day, don't forget to bring your umbrella! 下雨天時，當你離家時，不要忘記帶雨傘。
items.sch: 彰化縣二水鄉源泉國小

items.s1: An oar is a long pole that you can use to propel a boat through the water.
items.s1z: 槳是一根長竿，用來讓船在水中前進。
items.s2: These students are using oars to row their boats around a large indoor swimming pool.
items.s2z: 這些學生用槳在大型室內游泳池划船。
items.sch: 彰化縣和美鎮和美高中

items.s1: Calligraphy requires great attention to detail.
items.s1z: 寫書法極需注意細節。
items.s2: The calligraphy teacher has incredible attention to detail; you can tell by the way he instructs his students.
items.s2z: 書法老師非常注意細節，你看他指導學生的方式便能看出來。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: At dismissal the students wait outside for their parents to pick them up from school.
items.s1z: 放學時間，學生在外面等待父母接他們回家。
items.s2: You should have all your belongings with you at dismissal time.
items.s2z: 放學時，你應該將所有個人物品都帶到。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: The teacher asks several students to line up at the starting line.
items.s1z: 老師要求一些學生在起跑線排隊。
items.s2: Once the teacher gives them the signal, they all take off running from the starting line.
items.s2z: 當老師發號施令後，他們從起跑線開始向前跑。
items.sch: 彰化縣伸港鄉新港國小

items.s1: The teacher is showing students how to start a fire in a rocket stove with wood and paper.
items.s1z: 老師為學生示範如何用木柴和紙在火箭爐中生火。
items.s2: Once the students get their fires burning, they use small pans to cook popcorn on top of the rocket stoves.
items.s2z: 一旦學生讓火開始燃燒，他們用小平底鍋在火箭爐上面煮爆米花。
items.sch: 彰化縣北斗國中

items.s1: Balloons expand when you fill them with air.
items.s1z: 當你幫氣球打氣時，氣球會變大。
items.s2: Once the balloons are filled with air, you can use them to make all sorts of interesting designs.
items.s2z: 一旦氣球充滿空氣，你能做成不同有趣的造型。
items.sch: 彰化縣溪州鄉溪州國小

items.s2: After using the weather vane, the students wrote the direction of the wind in their workbook.
items.s2z: 使用風向標後，學生們在他們的作業本上寫下風的方向。

items.sch: 彰化縣和美鎮和美高中

items.s1: The school takes the students on an exciting and educational field trip to a museum.
items.s1z: 學校帶領學生到一個博物館做戶外教學。
items.s2: The museum has a variety of exhibits about Taiwanese history for visitors to enjoy.

items.sch: 彰化縣和美鎮和美高中

items.s1: The school encourages students to read more by taking them to the library to read each week.

items.s2: The school also encourages them to read by giving awards to students that finish a lot of books.
items.s2z: 學校也藉由頒獎給讀很多書的小朋友來鼓勵他們。

items.s1: The basketball players perform various drills to improve their skills.

items.s1: When the students arrive at school in the morning, they get in line and wait for their turn to practice English.

items.s2: Once they get to the front of the line, the teacher asks them to read several phrases in English.

items.s1: A pencil sharpener is a tool for sharpening the tip of a pencil.

items.s1: On rainy days, people use umbrellas to shield themselves from the rain.

items.s1: Calligraphy requires great attention to detail.

items.s1: At dismissal the students wait outside for their parents to pick them up from school.

items.s1: The teacher asks several students to line up at the starting line.

items.s1: It's important to wash your hands after using the bathroom.

items.s1: In Taiwan, all elementary schools have professional development on Wednesday afternoons.
